body: ## Purpose ## Content - [x] rotate contravariant vectors to cartesian basis (atmos u_int, atmos v_int, momentum fluxes) - [x] plot more fields for ocean (T, salinity, free surface, u, v) - [x] plot more fields for sea ice (ice thickness, ice concentration) ## Updated plots From CMIP runs in [this build](https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-ci/builds/8172#_) #### Oceananigans debug plots #### ClimaSeaIce debug plots #### Coupler fields _before_ this PR (on unphysical basis) #### Coupler fields _after_ this PR (on Cartesian basis)
title: improve debug plots

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
Adds a longrun for prognostic edmf 1m so it's clear what the config is. I comment it out in the pipeline for now. It's using the toml we have now, which may not be ideal. We can test it later.

Also corrects some configs and changes to ARS232 for diagnostic EDMF. This is what we have been using recently, but we haven't finalized it.

title: add prognostic edmf 1m longrun
